Task.title: Task
Task.description: A user-created task with priority, due date, status, category, and reminder settings.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

title.description: The title of the task. Max 100 chars.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

priority.description: The priority level of the task.

category.description: The category context of the task.

dueDate.description: ISO timestamp for when the task is due.

reminderTime.description: ISO timestamp for an optional set reminder alert.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of last task update.

tasks/{taskId}.description: All tasks stored securely under a random document ID.
